calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jun-16-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jul-27-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-11-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Kithas for Petitioners.
George McNitt appeared by telephone for Shiffen Melaku (Respondent).

The Court noted that venue appears to be in Alameda County and questions why this matter is not going off calendar. Mr. Kithas stated that he filed a Motion to Withdraw as Counsel, that his Clients have not communicated with him to sign the verification, and that he reached a stipulation with Mr. McNitt to keep this petition on until they file in Alameda so that not to have any statute of limitations issue. Mr. McNitt stated that they do have an agreement, that he has no objection to allow Mr. Kithas the opportunity to work things out with his Clients, that he disagrees with venue being in San Francisco, and that they have an agreement to continue this petition here until the petition is filed in Alameda. The Court stated that given the agreement, the Petition to Remove Trustee and to Appoint a Successor Trustee is off calendar for lack of venue in San Francisco.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
